raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Consumer Privacy Act allows consumers greater ability to protect their personal contact information from being shared.",
    "The California Consumer Privacy Act includes exceptions that allow car dealers to share consumer information for safety recalls and warranty information.",
    "AB 335 extends the exceptions for car dealers to watercraft dealers for sharing safety recall information.",
    "Federal law requires that safety recall information be shared when a watercraft is purchased.",
    "The California Consumer Privacy Act complicates the sharing of safety recall information when consumers exercise their privacy rights.",
    "California is the third largest boating state.",
    "Californians purchased $718 million in new boats, engines, and trailers in 2018.",
    "Manufacturers of watercraft should be able to verify warranties and contact owners in the event of a safety recall."
  ]
}
```
